name: Health Connect Bridge
description: Receives health data from Android Health Connect via HTTP and provides agent tools to query it.

authToken.description: Bearer token for authenticating incoming HTTP requests from the Android app

storagePath.description: Path to store health data JSON files (default: ~/.openclaw/health-connect-data)

httpPath.description: HTTP path for the sync endpoint (default: /health-connect/sync)

httpPort.description: Port for the plugin's HTTP server (default: 18790)

httpBind.description: Bind address for the HTTP server (default: 0.0.0.0)

retentionDays.description: Number of days to retain health data
